description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a flat roof, predominantly finished in white and black. The structure includes a large, partially covered outdoor area with a wooden deck and a rectangular pool, as well as a green strip of lawn along one side. The roof is a combination of flat and slightly sloped sections, with a prominent black section and a smaller white rooftop structure. Large windows and sliding doors are visible on the main facade, providing ample natural light and access to the outdoor spaces. The rear and side elevations are more solid, with fewer windows and a focus on privacy. The overall layout suggests a single-story residence with an open-plan living area and integrated outdoor amenities.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white and black exterior, large windows, a wooden deck, and a pool. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integrated outdoor living.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, large windows, a covered driveway, and a wooden deck area extending from the house.
description_view_1: This view highlights the rear of the house, featuring the wooden deck, pool, and a more private facade with fewer windows.
description_view_2: The side view reveals a long green lawn strip, minimal windows, and the transition between the black and white roof sections.
description_view_3: The opposite rear view emphasizes the pool, wooden deck, and the extensive flat roof, with the house's solid white walls enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a large, modern door with adjacent windows, a covered area, and a seamless transition to the driveway and deck.
